title: payment — published events
description: Every event implements `ShouldDispatchAfterCommit` so listeners never fire against a rolled-back write. `PaymentCaptured` is the primary success signal — it fans out to the TransactionRecorder + Invoice.mark_paid + growth::marketing capture. `PaymentDisputeOpened` is a P1 for high-value disputes (>$500 configurable threshold). `PaymentProviderCircuitBreakerOpened` pages ops when a provider is unreachable. `PaymentWebhookReceived` is a low-signal audit trail event for every inbound webhook regardless of validity.

events.name: PaymentIntentCreated
events.trigger: PaymentIntentObserver.created after the payment_intents row commits. status='initialized'. Fires once per intent.

events.name: PaymentIntentRequiresAction
events.trigger: Status transitioned to 'requires_action'. Customer must complete a step-up flow (typically 3DS2 challenge). next_action_type + next_action_url populated.

events.name: PaymentIntentProcessing
events.trigger: Status transitioned to 'processing'. Provider accepted the confirmation and is processing async. Terminal within a short window (seconds to minutes).

events.name: PaymentIntentSucceeded
events.trigger: Status transitioned to 'succeeded'. Money captured. A Payment row was atomically created in the same DB transaction — this event fires after that transaction commits. Precedes PaymentCaptured (which fires from the Payment side).

events.name: PaymentIntentFailed
events.trigger: Status transitioned to 'failed'. Provider rejected the confirmation. Terminal. last_error_code + last_error_type populated.

events.name: PaymentIntentCancelled
events.trigger: Status transitioned to 'cancelled'. Customer or system cancelled. cancellation_reason populated.

events.name: PaymentIntentExpired
events.trigger: ExpireStalePaymentIntentsJob nightly sweep marked an intent 'cancelled' with cancellation_reason='expired' (>24h in non-terminal status). Signals abandoned checkouts.

events.name: PaymentCaptured
events.trigger: PRIMARY SUCCESS SIGNAL. PaymentObserver.created after the payments row commits. Fires the three atomic side effects: TransactionRecorder.record + Invoice.mark_paid + growth::marketing::CaptureMembershipPurchasedMarketingEvent (when invoice.membership_id is set).
consumers: transaction::RecordPaymentTransaction (double-entry: debit cash, credit accounts_receivable — same DB txn)
invoice::MarkInvoicePaidOnPaymentCaptured (state update: paid or partially_paid — same DB txn)

events.name: PaymentPartiallyCaptured
events.trigger: Manual capture flow: capture_method='manual' with partial amount. amount_cents < intent.amount_cents. The invoice becomes 'partially_paid' rather than 'paid'.

events.name: PaymentCaptureFailed
events.trigger: Manual capture attempt failed. Authorization hold may have expired or provider rejected. The intent stays in requires_capture state until retry-limit exhausted or manually cancelled.

events.name: PaymentMethodAttached
events.trigger: PaymentMethodObserver.created — customer saved a payment method (SetupIntent flow or first payment with save=true).

events.name: PaymentMethodDetached
events.trigger: PaymentMethodObserver.deleted (soft-delete) OR is_active transitioned false. Provider-side detach dispatched (Stripe DetachPaymentMethod, Adyen storedPaymentMethod delete).

events.name: PaymentMethodExpired
events.trigger: SyncPaymentMethodExpiryJob detected the card's exp_month + exp_year has passed. is_active flipped false with deactivated_reason='card_expired'.

events.name: PaymentMethodVerified
events.trigger: Bank_debit method (typically ACH) completed micro-deposit verification. verified_at populated. The method can now dispatch payments.

events.name: PaymentMethodDuplicateDetected
events.trigger: PaymentMethodObserver detected a duplicate via fingerprint_hash. Existing method re-activated (if soft-deleted or is_active=false); new insert refused.

events.name: PaymentDisputeOpened
events.trigger: Provider webhook reported a new dispute. PaymentDisputeObserver.created. Fires CollectDisputeEvidenceJob + P1 notification for high-value disputes (> $500 configurable).
consumers: notifications::DispatchPaymentDisputeOpenedNotification (admin — P1 for high-value; standard for low)

events.name: PaymentDisputeEvidenceSubmitted
events.trigger: SubmitDisputeEvidenceJob completed. evidence_submitted_at populated.

events.name: PaymentDisputeClosed
events.trigger: PaymentDisputeObserver detected status transitioned to a terminal state (won / lost / charge_refunded / warning_closed). closed_at populated.

events.name: PaymentDisputeWon
events.trigger: Dispute outcome = 'won'. Merchant prevailed; funds returned. Fires from PaymentDisputeObserver when status transitions to 'won'.

events.name: PaymentDisputeLost
events.trigger: Dispute outcome = 'lost'. Merchant lost; funds permanently reversed. Triggers EscalateDisputeToChargebackJob → creates Chargeback row via chargeback module.

events.name: PaymentDisputeEscalatedToChargeback
events.trigger: EscalateDisputeToChargebackJob created a Chargeback row via chargeback module. dispute.chargeback_id populated.

events.name: PaymentProviderConfigured
events.trigger: Admin configured a new provider config via POST /payment-providers.
consumers: audit::WriteToAuditLog (retention: 7 years — provider connection is a compliance-relevant integration)

events.name: PaymentProviderDeactivated
events.trigger: Provider config soft-deleted or is_active flipped false.

events.name: PaymentProviderCircuitBreakerOpened
events.trigger: CRITICAL. N consecutive failures against a provider triggered the circuit breaker. Every fire is a P1 signal — captures against this provider are paused until the breaker resets.

events.name: PaymentWebhookReceived
events.trigger: Every inbound provider webhook (verified or unverified). Low-signal audit trail event — feeds security incident investigations.
consumers: audit::WriteToAuditLog (compliance record — every inbound webhook logged)

payload.tenant_id: ULID | null (null when tenant cannot be resolved from the webhook body — signature-invalid case)

events.name: PaymentReconcileCompleted
events.trigger: ReconcilePaymentIntentsJob completed a reconciliation run. Payload carries drift counts.
